name: Eidai Kako Co.,Ltd.
summary: Eidai Kako Co.,Ltd. manufactures, imports, exports, and sells synthetic resin sheets and molded products. The company offers synthetic resin deformed molded products, including interior/exterior parts for home appliances, building materials of homes, and office furniture products; and floor mats for vehicles, bath lids, kitchen supplies, and pipe hangers. It also provides semiconductor-related parts, such as IC containers; laboratory benches and partition parts for office furniture parts; industrial related parts that are used in the field of terminal block covers, LED lighting covers, aircraft parts, and escalator sliding parts; and sewer pipe rehabilitation materials, concrete block flexible joints, landscape materials, bamboo panels, etc.; and various car accessories. The company was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
